text: Schema validation checks that incoming data conforms to expected columns, types, and constraints.
explanation: It prevents silent data issues from destabilizing training and inference.
usage: Essential in production ML pipelines and data quality frameworks.
spanish: La validación de esquema comprueba que los datos entrantes cumplan columnas, tipos y restricciones esperadas.

text: Data lineage tracks where data comes from, how it is transformed, and where it is consumed.
explanation: It is crucial for reproducibility, auditing, and debugging model issues.
usage: Important in regulated and enterprise AI systems.
spanish: La lineage de datos rastrea de dónde provienen los datos, cómo se transforman y dónde se consumen.

scenario: Feature Stores: Online and Offline Features ⚡
text: Feature stores provide both offline training features and online serving features from the same source of truth.
explanation: This prevents train/serve skew and improves consistency across environments.
usage: Common in recommendation, fraud, and personalization systems.
spanish: Los feature stores proporcionan features offline para entrenamiento y features online para serving desde la misma fuente de verdad.

text: A/B testing compares two versions of a system by randomizing users and measuring business or model outcomes.
explanation: It is the gold standard for validating product changes and algorithmic interventions.
usage: Widely used in ranking, search, and product experimentation.
spanish: El A/B testing compara dos versiones de un sistema randomizando usuarios y midiendo resultados de negocio o del modelo.

text: Statistical power measures how likely an experiment is to detect a real effect when one exists.
explanation: Low-powered tests waste time and can produce false negatives.
usage: Important for experiment design, budget planning, and launch decisions.
spanish: La potencia estadística mide qué tan probable es que un experimento detecte un efecto real cuando existe.

text: Train-serve skew occurs when the features used during training differ from those used at inference time.
explanation: It is a frequent cause of unexpected performance drops in production ML.
usage: Critical for real-time scoring, search, and personalization systems.
spanish: El train-serve skew ocurre cuando las features usadas durante entrenamiento difieren de las usadas en inferencia.
